name: Maurice Hines
abstract: Maurice Robert Hines Jr. (December 13, 1943 – December 29, 2023) was an American actor, director, singer, and choreographer.

about_quotes.speaker: Byron Stripling
about_quotes.evidence: Maurice Hines, the other Hines brother, he introduced me to my future wife. He became good friends.

about_quotes.evidence: actually my trio was in Florida with Maurice Hines just before that.
